2604.26768.title: Decoupling Knowledge and Task Subspaces for Composable Parametric Retrieval Augmented Generation
2604.26768.paper_summary: Parametric Retrieval-Augmented Generation (PRAG) encodes external documents into lightweight parameter modules that can be retrieved and merged at inference time, offering a promising alternative to in-context retrieval augmentation. Despite its potential, many PRAG implementations train document adapters with task-supervised objectives, which may cause each adapter to encode both document-specific facts and reusable task-solving behavior. This entanglement may make adapter composition less reliable: when multiple adapters are merged at inference time, their overlapping task behaviors can accumulate together with document-specific updates, potentially making the merged adapter less stable and less focused on the intended document knowledge. To examine this issue, we explore Orthogonal Subspace Decomposition (OSD), an adapter-training setup that separates reusable task behavior from document-specific knowledge adapters. Concretely, we first train a Task LoRA to capture reusable task behavior, and then train document LoRAs to encode document-specific knowledge in a orthogonal subspace. This setup provides a controlled way to examine how orthogonalizing task and document LoRA updates affects adapter composition in multi-document PRAG. Experiments across multiple knowledge-intensive tasks and model scales suggest that this orthogonalization strategy can improve compositional robustness in parametric RAG, especially when multiple document adapters are merged.
2604.26768.paper_summary_zh: 參數檢索增強生成（PRAG）將外部文檔編碼為輕量級參數模塊，這些模塊可以在推理時被檢索和合併，提供了一種有前景的替代方案來進行上下文檢索增強。儘管其潛力巨大，許多PRAG實現使用任務監督目標訓練文檔適配器，這可能導致每個適配器同時編碼文檔特定事實和可重用的任務解決行為。這種糾纏可能使得適配器的組合不那麼可靠：當多個適配器在推理時合併時，它們重疊的任務行為可能與文檔特定的更新一起累積，從而使合併的適配器不那麼穩定，且不那麼專注於預期的文檔知識。為了檢查這個問題，我們探索了正交子空間分解（OSD），這是一種將可重用的任務行為與文檔特定知識適配器分開的適配器訓練設置。具體來說，我們首先訓練一個任務LoRA來捕捉可重用的任務行為，然後訓練文檔LoRA來在正交子空間中編碼文檔特定知識。這種設置提供了一種受控的方法來檢查正交化任務和文檔LoRA更新如何影響多文檔PRAG中的適配器組合。在多個知識密集型任務和模型規模上的實驗表明，這種正交化策略可以改善參數RAG中的組合穩健性，特別是在合併多個文檔適配器時。
2604.26768.author: Weihang Su et.al.
2604.26768.authors: Weihang Su, Hanwen Zhang, Qingyao Ai, Yiqun Liu
